critic_raw:
## Critique (Multiround Run 2): MRR@10 wrong primary metric for top-10 support search

Recall@10 answers 'is there a relevant article in the top 10?' MRR@10 answers 'at what rank does the first relevant article appear?' For agents using a top-10 result UI, coverage (Recall@10) is the operationally relevant question.
defender_raw:
## Defense (Multiround Run 2): Concede Issue 1

Recall@10 is the right primary metric for top-10 browsing window coverage.
